description.value:
Old forge-scripts for binding seams — Dverg masons once used these runic stitches to hold tunnel ceilings together; a smith clever enough to adapt them to plate-rings finds the magic transfers admirably.

Effect: At the start of each encounter, you gain damage immunity 5 until the end of the encounter.

Rules: Encounter; Damage Immunity.

project.prerequisites: A suit of armor of at least basic quality; access to Dverg forge-texts
